'''wochavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhabdomyoid|rhabdomyoid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhabdomyoid|rhabdomyoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wochavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wochavithi|wochavithi]] || [[word:wochaviji|wochaviji]] || [[word:wochavishi|wochavishi]] || [[word:wochaviki|wochaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wochavuthuthu|wochavuthuthu]] || [[word:wochavujuju|wochavujuju]] || [[word:wochavushushu|wochavushushu]] || [[word:wochavukuku|wochavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wochavuthu|wochavuthu]] || [[word:wochavuju|wochavuju]] || [[word:wochavushu|wochavushu]] || [[word:wochavuku|wochavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wochavufthuf|wochavufthuf]] || [[word:wochavufjuf|wochavufjuf]] || [[word:wochavufshuf|wochavufshuf]] || [[word:wochavufkuf|wochavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wochavethe|wochavethe]] || [[word:wochaveje|wochaveje]] || [[word:wochaveshe|wochaveshe]] || [[word:wochaveke|wochaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wochavothotho|wochavothotho]] || [[word:wochavojojo|wochavojojo]] || [[word:wochavoshosho|wochavoshosho]] || [[word:wochavokoko|wochavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wochavotho|wochavotho]] || [[word:wochavojo|wochavojo]] || [[word:wochavosho|wochavosho]] || [[word:wochavoko|wochavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wochavofthof|wochavofthof]] || [[word:wochavofjof|wochavofjof]] || [[word:wochavofshof|wochavofshof]] || [[word:wochavofkof|wochavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wochavïfthïf|wochavïfthïf]] || [[word:wochavïfjïf|wochavïfjïf]] || [[word:wochavïfshïf|wochavïfshïf]] || [[word:wochavïfkïf|wochavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wochavïfthïfthïf|wochavïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:wochavïfjïfjïf|wochavïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:wochavïfshïfshïf|wochavïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:wochavïfkïfkïf|wochavïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wochavïfthïf|wochavïfthïf]] || [[word:wochavïfjïf|wochavïfjïf]] || [[word:wochavïfshïf|wochavïfshïf]] || [[word:wochavïfkïf|wochavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wochavïfthïf|wochavïfthïf]] || [[word:wochavïfjïf|wochavïfjïf]] || [[word:wochavïfshïf|wochavïfshïf]] || [[word:wochavïfkïf|wochavïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wochavæthæ|wochavæthæ]] || [[word:wochavæjæ|wochavæjæ]] || [[word:wochavæshæ|wochavæshæ]] || [[word:wochavækæ|wochavækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wochavathatha|wochavathatha]] || [[word:wochavajaja|wochavajaja]] || [[word:wochavashasha|wochavashasha]] || [[word:wochavakaka|wochavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wochavatha|wochavatha]] || [[word:wochavaja|wochavaja]] || [[word:wochavasha|wochavasha]] || [[word:wochavaka|wochavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wochavafthaf|wochavafthaf]] || [[word:wochavafjaf|wochavafjaf]] || [[word:wochavafshaf|wochavafshaf]] || [[word:wochavafkaf|wochavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wochavasha|wochavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wochavshësha|wochavshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wochavrosha|wochavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wochavmusha|wochavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wochavyasha|wochavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowochavnkshësha|gowochavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowochavnkrosha|gowochavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowochavnkmusha|gowochavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowochavnkyasha|gowochavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wochachavasha|wochachavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wochachavshësha|wochachavshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wochachavrosha|wochachavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wochachavmusha|wochachavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wochachavyasha|wochachavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowochachavnkshësha|gowochachavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowochachavnkrosha|gowochachavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowochachavnkmusha|gowochachavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowochachavnkyasha|gowochachavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wechævasha|wechævasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wechævshësha|wechævshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wechævrosha|wechævrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wechævmusha|wechævmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wechævyasha|wechævyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowechævnkshësha|gowechævnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowechævnkrosha|gowechævnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowechævnkmusha|gowechævnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowechævnkyasha|gowechævnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wochfavasha|wochfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wochfavshësha|wochfavshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wochfavrosha|wochfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wochfavmusha|wochfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wochfavyasha|wochfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowochfavnkshësha|gowochfavnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowochfavnkrosha|gowochfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowochfavnkmusha|gowochfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowochfavnkyasha|gowochfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
